settings.title: Settings
settings.failedToStartCheckout: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
settings.failedToGenerateCalendar: Failed to generate calendar feed URL.
settings.operandMustBeNumber: Operand must be a number for this field.
settings.tokenCreated: API token created. Copy it now — it will not be shown again.
settings.confirmRevokeToken: Revoke token "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: This will permanently delete the {name} workspace and all its data. This cannot be undone. Type the workspace name to confirm.
settings.proProText: Your workspace is on the Pro plan. To manage or cancel your subscription, please contact support or visit the Stripe customer portal.
settings.apiTokensDesc: Generate bearer tokens to authenticate API requests. Store them securely — they are shown only once.
settings.tokenCreatedBanner: Token created — copy it now. It will not be shown again.
settings.webhooksDesc: Receive signed POST requests when CRM events occur. Leave the events field empty to subscribe to all events.
settings.calendarFeedDesc: Subscribe to your tasks in any calendar app (Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar) using an iCal feed.
settings.calendarFeedReadOnly: Add this URL as a subscribed calendar. The feed is read-only.
settings.notificationsDesc: Manage email and push notification preferences for this workspace.
settings.weeklyDigestDesc: A summary email with pipeline stats, sent every Monday.
settings.browserPushDesc: Receive alerts when a task is due or a new lead is assigned to you.
settings.brandingDesc: Customise the logo and brand colour for your workspace. Available on Pro.
settings.upgradeToBranding: Upgrade to Pro to unlock white-label branding.
settings.leadScoringDesc: Configure weighted rules to auto-score incoming leads based on field values. Higher score = higher priority.
settings.noRules: No rules yet. Add your first rule below.
